JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACINNIS, JAMIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1554 HOWARD STREET #111 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL JUN-16-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. DOES NOT VACATE BY 6/16/98 AT 5:00 P.M. PLTF. TO HAVE AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR UNPAID RENT OF $360.00 AND DAILY DAMAGES OF $17.14 FROM 5/8/98 THROUGH 6/16/98 AND COST OF $168.00 FOR A TOTAL AMENDED JUDGMENT OF $1,223.60. SECURITY DEPOSIT FORFEITED TO PLAINTIFF. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
